prediction_markets_actual._source: Keyrock x Dune, 'Prediction Markets: The Next Frontier of Financial Markets' (primary report, in-repo PDF, §2)

prediction_markets_forecast._note: Keyrock/Dune report does NOT include a 2026+ industry forecast. Prior attribution of '$1.3T 2026' to Keyrock was misattributed and has been removed. Forward TAM in this project is derived from observed Nov-2025 run-rate × project-specific CAGR assumption, not from an external forecast.
prediction_markets_forecast.ekg_notes: Contingent on regulatory clarity. Supreme Court resolution unlikely before 2027. Source: InGame citing EKG report.
prediction_markets_forecast.chamath_quote: Over $6B in weekly trading volume, 100x growth in ~2 years (CoinCentral, informal)

layer_1_sports_betting.notes: Prediction markets compete directly with sportsbooks at lower vig. 60%+ of Polymarket OI is sports.

layer_2_financial_derivatives_retail.notes: Event contracts as new product class. Fed decisions, earnings, macro.

layer_3_information_sentiment.notes: ICE data thesis. Polymarket Signals & Sentiment as institutional product.

public_co_revenue_reference.source: Coherent Market Insights citing DraftKings filing, ARK Invest estimate
